items.title: The PlayStation replica ornament is an homage to a great, yet fragile console
items.summary: You probably know the signature PlayStation boot sound. Did you know that it's technically a multi-part chime? There's the synthy section where "Sony Computer Entertainment" shows onscreen with a white background. You only get to the next screen with the echo-y chimes and the color-filled PlayStation logo if your console recognizes the disc. How badly […]

items.summary: Amazon is giving folks another chance to pick up its popular Flip 8-in-1 Air Fryer Toaster Oven Combo back at $149.94 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. Down from $250, we’ve consistently seen discounts bringing the costs down to this same rate throughout 2026, with this price having held out after last month’s Prime Day until a week ago when it raised back up in price. Now, it’s dropping back down with $100 savings, giving you the best price we have tracked this year that sits just $20 above the all-time low we last saw during Black Friday in 2025. There are tons more of Ninja’s appliance deals waiting for you in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.summary:
LEGO Star Wars AT-AT Walker set

Buy for $52 (Reg. $65)

What we love

Whether you’re a lover of LEGO or a lover of Star Wars, this 525-piece set gives you a microscale build of the infamous AT-AT walker, as well as a Rebel Snowspeeder, as seen in The Empire Strikes Back. It will make a great addition to any collection or can stand out as décor on its own, standing only 6.5 inches high once completed.

items.title: Add up to an 8TB SATA SSD to your PC while Samsung’s 870 EVO drives are up to 52% off with rare deals
items.summary: We are now tracking a handful of solid deals on Samsung’s 870 EVO SATA SSDs at Amazon, and you can save up to 52% on them right now with deals from $249.9 shipped for the 1TB 870 EVO. That’s the lowest price we have tracked since it jumped up in price earlier this year to fetch as much as $520 in recent months. Not only is it the lowest price we have tracked for this drive, but it’s also matching the 512GB variant’s price right now, which is down from its $300 usual going rate. The 2TB variant of the Samsung 870 EVO is seeing the best deal right now at $399.99 shipped, which works out to a 41% discount. Head below for more details.
